title: armeria alpina subsp. trachyphylla
intro: Armeria alpina subsp. trachyphylla, also known as the Alpine Sea Thrift, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Plumbaginaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Armeria alpina subsp. trachyphylla include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antioxidant activity. Herbal preparations of this plant are often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures, and it is also used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
